[D1] (5:6-5:30) TS377013: This pipe call contains no arguments. effect(unnecessaryPipe)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the pipe call"

[D2] (8:6-8:30) TS377013: This pipe call contains no arguments. effect(unnecessaryPipe)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the pipe call"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Remove the pipe call" ===

--- file:///.src/unnecessaryPipe_disableMidObject.ts ---
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test = {
  a:Effect.succeed(42),
  // @effect-diagnostics-next-line unnecessaryPipe:off
  b: pipe(Effect.succeed(43)),
  c: pipe(Effect.succeed(44))
}


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryPipe for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Remove the pipe call" ===

--- file:///.src/unnecessaryPipe_disableMidObject.ts ---
import { pipe } from "effect"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

export const test = {
  a: pipe(Effect.succeed(42)),
  // @effect-diagnostics-next-line unnecessaryPipe:off
  b: pipe(Effect.succeed(43)),
  c:Effect.succeed(44)
}
